reuse_findings.reason: Table 'dealers' does not exist in baseline schema.ts. It is created by E-102, which is currently unapproved (verdict=reject). Unit YAML must declare depends_on: [E-102] so the loop won't run E-105 before the dealers table exists.

Table 'dealer_nbfc_assignments' does not exist in baseline schema.ts. No similarly-named table found in baseline. Unit must declare depends_on to the (currently-missing) unit that creates this table — likely E-012 in the existing unit set, but that unit is not in depends_on.

reuse_findings.ts_line_drift_warning: claimed schema_ts_line=1 but actual is 176 — placeholder line numbers in YAML

notes: Sync Audit G-10 (MEDIUM) — V2-Feb POST /api/leads/create has no validation that dealer is Active. Resolution F adds three pre-insert guards (DEALER_NOT_ACTIVE, FINANCE_NOT_ENABLED, NO_ACTIVE_NBFC).

PRIMARY BLOCKER: depends_on is empty but the unit reads from two tables that do not yet exist (dealers via E-102, dealer_nbfc_assignments via E-012). The loop will fail-fast trying to compile against absent Drizzle exports.

Recommendation: amend depends_on to ['E-102', 'E-012'] (or whatever unit owns dealer_nbfc_assignments). Once E-102 ships and clears its own audit, this unit can be re-audited and should clear cleanly (no schema changes of its own).
leads.payment_method, leads.dealer_id, leads.id all verified in baseline at ts_line 176.
